description: Bugfix cycle 2 for Milestone 12 — Notification System. Fixes 1 defect found in QA review: EmailPreferencesPanel crash due to backend/frontend response shape mismatch.

userStories.title: Fix: EmailPreferencesPanel crash — backend response shape mismatch
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m12-notifications.md. The backend _build_preferences_response() returns flat dicts per category but the frontend expects nested {label, preferences} structure, causing a TypeError crash.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/users/me/notification-preferences returns categories with nested structure: {"Collaboration": {"label": "Collaboration", "preferences": {"collaboration_invitation": true, ...}}}
EmailPreferencesPanel opens without crashing and displays all preference toggles
Existing tests in test_notification_prefs.py updated to match new response shape and pass
PATCH /api/users/me/notification-preferences still works correctly with partial merge
userStories.notes:
Defect: DEF-001. Files: services/gateway/apps/authentication/views.py:201, services/gateway/apps/authentication/tests/test_notification_prefs.py, frontend/src/api/notifications.ts:69-76, frontend/src/components/notifications/EmailPreferencesPanel.tsx:100-104.

Expected: Frontend EmailPreferencesCategory type has {label: string, preferences: Record<string, boolean>}. The useEffect at EmailPreferencesPanel.tsx:100-104 iterates cat.preferences.

Actual: Backend _build_preferences_response() at views.py:201 does `categories[cat_name] = prefs` returning a flat dict. cat.preferences is undefined, Object.entries(undefined) throws TypeError.

Fix: Change views.py:201 from `categories[cat_name] = prefs` to `categories[cat_name] = {"label": cat_name, "preferences": prefs}`. Then update ALL test assertions in test_notification_prefs.py to access nested path:
- Line 56-58: iterate prefs["preferences"].values() instead of prefs.values()
- Line 71: cats["Collaboration"]["preferences"]["collaboration_invitation"]
- Line 72: cats["Collaboration"]["preferences"]["collaborator_joined"]
- Line 73: cats["Chat"]["preferences"]["chat_mention"]
- Line 102: cats["Admin"]["preferences"]["monitoring_alert"]
- Line 103: cats["Admin"]["preferences"]["monitoring_alert"]
- Line 128: cats["Collaboration"]["preferences"]["collaboration_invitation"]
- Line 129: cats["Review"]["preferences"]["review_state_changed"]

DO NOT modify the frontend — the frontend types are correct. Only fix the backend response shape and update backend tests.
